name: siftmarks
description: Local-first AI bookmark manager with semantic search, cleanup PRs, and MCP support

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/ai && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/indexer && npm run build -w apps/cli && npm run build -w apps/mcp-server
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/web
